# Pavel Storozhuk — Software Pricing Consultant & Advisor

> Independent software pricing consultant and advisor based in Frankfurt, Germany, with 14+ years of experience in software and technology pricing. Operating independently since late 2023, Pavel Storozhuk works remotely with growing software and technology companies — primarily US-based, occasionally EU-based — to design, implement, and refine pricing strategy across software-license, SaaS, PaaS, and IaaS business models.

Pavel is typically engaged by companies that need senior pricing expertise on a project or ongoing advisory basis — where a full-time pricing hire would be excessive and large consulting firms would be too slow or too costly. Engagements combine quantitative and qualitative methods, emphasize practical and easy-to-implement solutions, and include continued support through implementation and as market conditions change.

Working model: remote, project-based or ongoing advisory. Languages: English (primary), Russian (native), basic German and Czech.

Core services:

- **Pricing strategy**: New pricing models — packaging, tiers, and discounting frameworks aligned to product strategy and business goals.
- **Price realization**: Stronger discount discipline and pricing governance across go-to-market (GTM) channels.
- **Price level calibration**: Optimizing price points to maximize revenue, product adoption, or customer retention.
- **New product launches**: Data-driven pricing for new offerings and business-model transitions.
- **Pricing diagnostics**: Assessing current pricing strategy and price realization to surface improvement opportunities.
- **Competitive benchmarking**: Monitoring competitive pricing position relative to the market.
- **Pricing process**: Reviewing pricing-organization structure, tooling, and decision-making workflows.
- **CPQ implementation support**: Defining pricing requirements for Configure, Price, Quote (CPQ) tools and price-list implementation.

## Primary content

- [Full content (Markdown)](https://yourpricing.pro/index.html.md): Clean, complete Markdown version of the site — the preferred source for LLMs to read.
- [Live site (HTML)](https://yourpricing.pro/): The human-facing single-page site that the Markdown above mirrors. The links under "Optional" are anchored sections of this page.
